body.title: Fix missing twm_observations table — breaking habits every NE cycle
body.result: fixed: learn_top_gap/flag_top_gap/review_turn_traces used make_home_proxy (no instance schema); added _local_db_proxy() singleton using make_local_proxy() — commit 08253488
body.description:
DB error: relation "twm_observations" does not exist — firing on every NE cycle in learn_top_gap and other habits. Multiple lever-watcher ticks fail silently. Table is referenced in code but doesn't exist in the schema.

**Affected files:** Igor DB schema (clan or instance schema), migration script or schema init
**Design rules:** Postgres only — no SQLite fallback
**Scope boundary:** Create twm_observations table with correct schema. Verify habits that reference it resume working. No code changes unless the schema definition is also wrong.
**Test plan:** After table creation, confirm learn_top_gap and other twm_observations-dependent habits run without DB error in ring_memory
